title: Add sign up option for user authentication

requirements.summary: Add a visible sign up option in the authentication flow that allows new users to create an account using Internet Identity
acceptanceCriteria: A sign up button or link is visible to unauthenticated users
The sign up option clearly indicates it creates a new account
Clicking sign up initiates the Internet Identity authentication flow
After successful sign up, the user is authenticated and can access protected features

file_operations.description: Update AuthButton to support both 'Sign In' and 'Sign Up' modes via a new optional prop (e.g., variant or label). Both actions call the same login function from useInternetIdentity, as Internet Identity handles account creation automatically. Ensure the button text differentiates clearly between 'Sign In' (for existing users) and 'Sign Up' (for new users) based on the prop provided.

requirements.summary: Update the AuthButton component to differentiate between sign in and sign up actions, or add a dedicated sign up button in prominent locations like the HomePage and ResultsPage
acceptanceCriteria: Sign up option is clearly distinguishable from sign in
Sign up is accessible from key pages where authentication is relevant
The UI clearly communicates the difference between signing in (existing user) and signing up (new user)

file_operations.description: Add a prominent sign up call-to-action section below the feature cards. Include an AuthButton component with variant='Sign Up' alongside messaging that encourages new users to create an account. Optionally include a small 'Already have an account? Sign In' link that renders an AuthButton with variant='Sign In'.

Update the existing anonymous user prompt to include both a 'Sign Up' button (primary) and a 'Sign In' link (secondary) using the AuthButton component with appropriate variants. Clearly communicate that signing up will allow users to save their results and track progress over time.

Update the header's authentication section for unauthenticated users to show both 'Sign Up' (primary/emphasized) and 'Sign In' (secondary) options using AuthButton components. Ensure the sign up option is visually prominent to encourage new user registration.
